sourcesContent:
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { useParams, Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useInvoices } from '../context/InvoiceContext'; import Button from '../components/common/Button'; import InvoiceDetail from '../components/invoices/InvoiceDetail'; import Modal from '../components/common/Modal'; const InvoiceDetailPage = () => { const { id } = useParams(); const { allInvoices, deleteInvoice } = useInvoices(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const [invoice, setInvoice] = useState(null); const [showDeleteModal, setShowDeleteModal] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { const foundInvoice = allInvoices.find((inv) => inv.id === id); setInvoice(foundInvoice || null); }, [id, allInvoices]); if (!invoice) { return (

Invoice not found

); } return (
#{invoice.invoiceNumber}

{invoice.clientName}

{formatCurrency(invoice.total, invoice.currency)}

Invoice Details

Invoice Date {formatDate(invoice.invoiceDate)}
Due Date {formatDate(invoice.dueDate)}
Status

Summary

Total {formatCurrency(invoice.total, invoice.currency)}

Items

{invoice.items?.map((item, index) => (
{item.description}
{item.quantity} × {formatCurrency(item.price, invoice.currency)}
{formatCurrency(item.quantity * item.price, invoice.currency)}
))}
Total {formatCurrency(invoice.total, invoice.currency)}
setShowDeleteModal(false)} title="Delete Invoice" >

Are you sure you want to delete invoice #{invoice.invoiceNumber}? This action cannot be undone.

); }; export default InvoiceDetailPage;
